FILING OF INVENTORY
Off Calendar Dec-04-2007 Continued To Jan-02-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Temporary And Permanent Successor Truste
Off Calendar Aug-23-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Debra Dolch (Conservator for the Case No. 290042 matter); Ernest Der (Counsel for Ms. Dolch); James Barringer (Court-appointed Counsel for Jeanne King for the Case No. 290042 matter). The appearance of Jeanne King (Trustor) was excused.

Mr. Der requested that bond be waived. The Court indicated that there was no need for a bond due to the fact that there are no assets in the Trust. The Court granted the Petition per modified Order and signed the Order for same in open court.

An accounting will not be required once Counsel files the Inventory showing that there are no assets in the Trust.

Judicial Officer: Commissioner Dorothy L. McMath; Reporter: Dave Davenport CSR# 1694; Court Investigator: Sandra Esteves-Guidi; Bailiff: Deputy T. Aguerre; Clerk: C. Joy Guandique.

Verified Petition For Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Temporary And Permanent Successor Truste
Off Calendar Jul-26-2007 Continued To Aug-23-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Ernest Der (Attorney for Temporary Successor Trustee) appeared for the purpose of extending the appointment of Temporary Successor Trustee to August 23, 2007. The Order for same was signed in open court.

Judicial Officer: Commissioner Dorothy L. McMath; Reporter: Dave Davenport CSR# 1694; Court Investigator: John Cushner; Bailiff: D. Handa; Clerk: H. Yung.
